reason: Create lifecycle definition schemas and built-in lifecycle definitions
Create barrel export file for lifecycle module
Add lifecycle field to AgentConfig schema in config/agent.ts
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts b/packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts
index 379301cd2..2708e9c83 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts
@@ -45,6 +45,13 @@ const AgentSchema = Schema.StructWithRest(
     }),
     maxSteps: Schema.optional(PositiveInt).annotate({ description: "@deprecated Use 'steps' field instead." }),
     permission: Schema.optional(ConfigPermission.Info),
+    lifecycle: Schema.optional(
+      Schema.Struct({
+        type: Schema.Literal("linear", "dag", "generic"),
+        phases: Schema.optional(Schema.Array(Schema.Any)),
+        transitions: Schema.optional(Schema.Array(Schema.Any)),
+      }),
+    ).annotate({ description: "Lifecycle definition for this agent — phases, transitions, and tool gating" }),
   }),
   [Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any)],
 )

reason: Add lifecycle field to Agent Info schema in agent/agent.ts
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/agent/agent.ts b/packages/opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
index 064a59f59..e57ec392c 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
@@ -45,6 +45,13 @@ export const Info = Schema.Struct({
   variant: Schema.optional(Schema.String),
   prompt: Schema.optional(Schema.String),
   options: Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Unknown),
+  lifecycle: Schema.optional(
+    Schema.Struct({
+      type: Schema.Literal("linear", "dag", "generic"),
+      phases: Schema.optional(Schema.Array(Schema.Any)),
+      transitions: Schema.optional(Schema.Array(Schema.Any)),
+    }),
+  ),
   steps: Schema.optional(Schema.Finite),
 }).annotate({ identifier: "Agent" })
 export type Info = DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof Info>>

reason: Fix Schema.Literal to Schema.Literals(array) — Schema.Literal does not accept variadic args in this Effect version
Fix Schema.Literal to Schema.Literals(array) — matching existing project conventions
Fix Schema.Literal to Schema.Literals(array) — matching existing project conventions
Fix Schema.Literal to Schema.Literals and add Schema.mutable to match project conventions for array fields in config
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts b/packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts
index 379301cd2..8d8cb0923 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/config/agent.ts
@@ -45,6 +45,13 @@ const AgentSchema = Schema.StructWithRest(
     }),
     maxSteps: Schema.optional(PositiveInt).annotate({ description: "@deprecated Use 'steps' field instead." }),
     permission: Schema.optional(ConfigPermission.Info),
+    lifecycle: Schema.optional(
+      Schema.Struct({
+        type: Schema.Literals(["linear", "dag", "generic"]),
+        phases: Schema.optional(Schema.mutable(Schema.Array(Schema.Any))),
+        transitions: Schema.optional(Schema.mutable(Schema.Array(Schema.Any))),
+      }),
+    ).annotate({ description: "Lifecycle definition for this agent — phases, transitions, and tool gating" }),
   }),
   [Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any)],
 )

reason: Rewrite engine.ts to use correct Effect API (catchCause instead of catchAll, remove evaluate, handle optional maxRetries)
Use explicit any type annotation instead of as-cast after yield* to avoid cast-on-Effect-object issue
